description: Production incident: Multiple partner integrations began reporting API timeout errors when calling the fictional Orders API at 14:06 UTC. Internal monitoring shows elevated p95 and p99 latency for the Orders API, while authentication success rate remains within normal range. A database index migration completed at 13:48 UTC for the orders table. One partner reports that smaller filtered requests usually complete, while broad date-range requests often time out. Customer support is asking for a partner-facing update.
confirmed_facts: Multiple partner integrations began reporting API timeout errors when calling the fictional Orders API at 14:06 UTC.
Internal monitoring shows elevated p95 and p99 latency for the Orders API.
Authentication success rate remains within normal range.
A database index migration completed at 13:48 UTC for the orders table.
One partner reports that smaller filtered requests usually complete.
Broad date-range requests often time out.
Customer support is asking for a partner-facing update.
unknowns: The exact root cause is unknown.
The complete list of affected partners is unknown.
Whether the 13:48 UTC database index migration caused the timeout errors is unknown.
The exact query patterns causing the highest latency are unknown.
